name: pepper
description: Runtime control for iOS simulator apps. Dylib injected at launch — no source modifications needed. 68 MCP tools for navigation, debugging, state inspection, and automation.

tools.name: look
tools.description: Primary observation tool — returns full UI hierarchy map

tools.name: tap
tools.description: Tap an element by accessibility label or coordinates

tools.name: scroll
tools.description: Scroll by direction, or pass target to scroll until specific text is visible

tools.name: swipe
tools.description: Swipe gesture with direction and distance

tools.name: input_text
tools.description: Type text into a field by label, accessibility ID, or focus

tools.name: navigate
tools.description: Navigate to a named route or deep link

tools.name: back
tools.description: Go back in the navigation stack

tools.name: dismiss
tools.description: Dismiss a presented modal or sheet

tools.name: dialog
tools.description: Interact with system alerts and dialogs

tools.name: heap
tools.description: Inspect the ObjC/Swift heap for object instances

tools.name: layers
tools.description: Dump the CALayer tree for rendering inspection

tools.name: crash_log
tools.description: Retrieve crash logs and stack traces

tools.name: constraints
tools.description: Dump AutoLayout constraints with ambiguity detection

tools.name: find
tools.description: Search the view hierarchy for elements matching a query

tools.name: read_element
tools.description: Read detailed properties of a specific element

tools.name: verify
tools.description: Verify an element exists and matches expected properties

tools.name: highlight
tools.description: Highlight an element on screen for visual debugging

tools.name: hook
tools.description: Hook an ObjC method to log calls or modify behavior

tools.name: dynamic_type
tools.description: Override Dynamic Type (font scaling) at runtime

tools.name: wait_for
tools.description: Wait for an element to appear

tools.name: wait_idle
tools.description: Wait for the app to become idle

tools.name: build_hardware
tools.description: Build the app for a physical device (USB/WiFi)

tools.name: deploy_sim
tools.description: Deploy and launch the app on simulator

tools.name: iterate
tools.description: Build, deploy, and verify in one step

tools.name: snapshot
tools.description: Capture screen state as a named snapshot for diffing

tools.name: diff
tools.description: Quick view hierarchy diff between two look snapshots

tools.name: accessibility_audit
tools.description: Run accessibility audit on the current screen

tools.name: coredata
tools.description: Inspect Core Data persistent stores and entities

tools.name: hangs
tools.description: Detect main thread hangs with symbolicated stack traces

tools.name: renders
tools.description: Track view render counts and off-screen renders

tools.name: swiftui_body
tools.description: Track per-view SwiftUI body evaluations with timing

tools.name: timers
tools.description: Inspect active NSTimer and DispatchSourceTimer instances

tools.name: webview
tools.description: Inspect and interact with WKWebView content

tools.name: frameworks
tools.description: List loaded dylibs and frameworks with versions, UUIDs, and segment info
